- content: 'Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024

    Attendee: Emma Johnson, David Lee, Linda Green, Mark Roberts


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the progress of the new project.

    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.

    '

args.subject: Action item from May 17 team meeting — Coordinate initial phase (deadline: 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Following the Team Meeting on May 17, 2024, you were assigned to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project. Please confirm that you have aligned with the development team and share the plan, key next steps, and expected timeline by the deadline: 2024-05-20.

If you anticipate any blockers or need support, let me know as soon as possible.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from May 17 team meeting — Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell (deadline: 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Following the Team Meeting on May 17, 2024, you were assigned to email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Please send that file and confirm when it has been sent. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

If you want, I can attach the file to the email before you send it—tell me and I will locate it.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from May 17 team meeting — Review sales projections (deadline: 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Following the Team Meeting on May 17, 2024, you were assigned to review the sales projections and provide your feedback. Please send your feedback and any suggested changes by the deadline: 2024-05-19.

If you need any additional data or clarification to complete the review, let me know.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
